/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/thermo_bridge_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/thermo_bridge_tests.dir/tests/test_thermo_bridge.cpp.o -o thermo_bridge_tests  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/share/dotnet/packs/Microsoft.NETCore.App.Host.linux-x64/10.0.5/runtimes/linux-x64/native libopenms_thermo_bridge.a _deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2Main.a /usr/share/dotnet/packs/Microsoft.NETCore.App.Host.linux-x64/10.0.5/runtimes/linux-x64/native/libnethost.so -ldl _deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2.a
